schema_note: WHOOP 5.0 (Maverick) protocol schema v0. Mirrors the 4.0 whoop_protocol.json top-level layout (version/enums/envelope/packets) so the Phase 5 Swift (Schema.swift / WhoopProtocol) and Python (whoop_protocol) loaders stay compatible. This envelope describes the Maverick OUTER WRAPPER (NOT the 4.0 inner frame). enums and packets are intentionally minimal in v0 — Phase 4 populates body field maps. Single source of truth for the 5.0 GATT UUIDs (D-04b).
framing_notes: Maverick outer wrapper, empirically verified on 5028 captured ATT frames across two sessions (Phase 1 + Phase 2). Layout: [0xAA SOF][0x01 version][length u16-LE][body (length bytes, FLAT, body[0]==role)][trailer 4B]. total_len == length + 8 (4-byte header + length-byte body + 4-byte trailer) for 5028/5028 frames. The body is FLAT — it is NOT a nested 0xAA 4.0 frame (RESEARCH Finding 5). The 4-byte trailer's checksum algorithm is OPEN (RESEARCH Finding 6): standard CRC16/CRC32 variants ruled out by exhaustive negative test.

envelope.name: length
envelope.note: u16-LE body length; total_len == length + 8 for 5028/5028 frames

envelope.name: body
envelope.note: flat body region; frame[4:4+length]. body[0]==role. length bytes total including role. NOT a nested 0xAA frame (Finding 5). Phase 4 populates field maps.

envelope.name: trailer
envelope.note: checksum algorithm OPEN; standard CRC16/CRC32 variants ruled out (Finding 6). Likely non-standard checksum or computed over a transformed input.
